I can help you with pretty much every step of your thesis journey! From brainstorming a topic to conducting research, analyzing papers, designing experiments, coding, writing chapters, and even preparing for your viva defense. But instead of listing everything, why don‚Äôt you tell me where you‚Äôre at? Do you already have a thesis topic in mind, or are you still exploring ideas? Let‚Äôs get started!

Ah, I‚Äôm here to assist you with your thesis, not to dive into my own architecture! Think of me as your friendly academic research buddy. So, let‚Äôs focus on you‚Äîwhat‚Äôs your thesis topic or area of interest? Are you leaning toward something in Machine Learning, AI, or still figuring it out?

**Commands:**
- `/topic <topic>` ‚Äî Set thesis topic
- `/area <area>` ‚Äî Set research area
- `/method <method>` ‚Äî Set methodology
- `/outline` ‚Äî Generate a full thesis outline
- `/write <chapter>` ‚Äî Draft a chapter (e.g. `/write Literature Review`)
- `/memory` ‚Äî View stored context
- `/reset` ‚Äî Clear conversation (memory persists)
- `/help` ‚Äî Show this help

**Other features:**
- **Upload PDF** ‚Äî Click üìé to upload and analyze a research paper
- **Export** ‚Äî Click ‚¨á on any AI response to download as Word, LaTeX, or Markdown
- **Drafts auto-save** ‚Äî Chapter drafts from `/write` are saved to the `drafts/` folder
